data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for SMS fallback to email, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature, but there are no concrete tests or validations demonstrating that the system can handle SMS failures and appropriately fallback to email notifications. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of SMS fallback to email functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the SMS fallback to email requirement.
